def compute_factor(df: pl.DataFrame) -> pl.Series:
    # adv20: 20-day average daily volume (proxy since adv20 is not in columns)
    adv20 = rolling_mean(pl.col('volume'), window=20)

    # sum(adv20, 14.7444) -> rolling sum with window 15
    sum_adv20 = rolling_sum(adv20, window=15)

    # correlation(close, sum_adv20, 6.00049) -> rolling correlation with window 6
    corr = rolling_corr(pl.col('close'), sum_adv20, window=6)

    # Ts_Rank(corr, 20.4195) -> time-series rank with window 20
    ts_rank_corr = ts_rank(corr, window=20)

    # (open + close) - (vwap + open) simplifies to (close - vwap)
    close_minus_vwap = pl.col('close') - pl.col('vwap')

    # Cross-sectional rank per date
    ranked = rank(close_minus_vwap).over('date')

    # (Ts_Rank < rank) * -1 -> -1 if true else 0
    factor = pl.when(ts_rank_corr < ranked).then(-1).otherwise(0)

    return df.select(factor).to_series()
